---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a reproducible bug in OpenBrigade
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened (include error messages, screenshots, or stack traces if available).

## Environment

| Item | Value |
|------|-------|
| OpenBrigade version / commit | <!-- e.g. 5.5.0 or git SHA --> |
| PHP version | <!-- e.g. 8.1 --> |
| MySQL / MariaDB version | <!-- e.g. MariaDB 10.6 --> |
| Web server | <!-- e.g. Apache 2.4 --> |
| OS | <!-- e.g. Ubuntu 22.04 --> |
| Browser (if UI issue) | <!-- e.g. Firefox 124 --> |

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem (e.g. specific configuration, custom modules, etc.).
